# Part 8 — Complete IR Car Code {.sdaia-dark background-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1C355E, #00C9A7)"}

## Code Listing {.scrollable}

```cpp
#include <IRremote.hpp> // Use .hpp for version 4.x+

unsigned char start01[] = {0x01,0x02,0x04,0x08,0x10,0x20,0x40,0x80,0x80,0x40,0x20,0x10,0x08,0x04,0x02,0x01};
unsigned char front[] = {0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x24,0x12,0x09,0x12,0x24,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00};
unsigned char back[] = {0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x24,0x48,0x90,0x48,0x24,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00};
unsigned char left[] = {0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x44,0x28,0x10,0x44,0x28,0x10,0x44,0x28,0x10,0x00};
unsigned char right[] = {0x00,0x10,0x28,0x44,0x10,0x28,0x44,0x10,0x28,0x44,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00};
unsigned char STOP01[] = {0x2E,0x2A,0x3A,0x00,0x02,0x3E,0x02,0x00,0x3E,0x22,0x3E,0x00,0x3E,0x0A,0x0E,0x00};
unsigned char clear[] = {0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00};

#define SCL_Pin  A5 
#define SDA_Pin  A4 
#define ML_Ctrl 4    
#define ML_PWM 5   
#define MR_Ctrl 2    
#define MR_PWM 6   

int RECV_PIN = 3;
int carSpeed = 100; 

// --- NEW VARIABLES FOR TIMEOUT ---
unsigned long lastSignalTime = 0;   // Stores the time of the last IR signal
const int timeoutThreshold = 200;   // Milliseconds to wait before stopping (IR repeats ~110ms)

void setup() {
    pinMode(ML_Ctrl, OUTPUT);
    pinMode(ML_PWM, OUTPUT);
    pinMode(MR_Ctrl, OUTPUT);
    pinMode(MR_PWM, OUTPUT);
    
    Serial.begin(9600);
    IrReceiver.begin(RECV_PIN, ENABLE_LED_FEEDBACK); 

    pinMode(SCL_Pin,OUTPUT);
    pinMode(SDA_Pin,OUTPUT);
    matrix_display(clear);
    matrix_display(start01);
}

void loop() {
    if (IrReceiver.decode()) {
        // If it's a repeat signal, just update the timer to keep the car moving
        if (IrReceiver.decodedIRData.flags & IRDATA_FLAGS_IS_REPEAT) {
            lastSignalTime = millis();
        } 
        else {
            // It's a new button press
            uint16_t command = IrReceiver.decodedIRData.command;
            lastSignalTime = millis(); // Update timer
            
            switch(command) {
                 case 0x46: car_front(); matrix_display(front); break; 
                 case 0x15: car_back();  matrix_display(back);  break; 
                 case 0x44: car_left();  matrix_display(left);  break; 
                 case 0x43: car_right(); matrix_display(right); break; 
                 case 0x40: car_Stop();  matrix_display(STOP01); break; 

                 case 0x16: // Speed Up
                    carSpeed = min(carSpeed + 20, 255);
                    break;
                 case 0x19: // Speed Down
                    carSpeed = max(carSpeed - 20, 0);
                    break;
            }
        }
        IrReceiver.resume(); 
    }

    // --- AUTOMATIC STOP LOGIC ---
    // If current time is 200ms past the last signal, stop the car
    if (millis() - lastSignalTime > timeoutThreshold) {
        car_Stop();
        // Optional: matrix_display(clear); 
    }
}

// --- Movement Functions ---
void car_front() {
    digitalWrite(ML_Ctrl, HIGH);
    analogWrite(ML_PWM, carSpeed);
    digitalWrite(MR_Ctrl, HIGH);
    analogWrite(MR_PWM, carSpeed);
}

void car_back() {
    digitalWrite(ML_Ctrl, LOW);
    analogWrite(ML_PWM, carSpeed);
    digitalWrite(MR_Ctrl, LOW);
    analogWrite(MR_PWM, carSpeed);
}

void car_left() {
    digitalWrite(ML_Ctrl, LOW);
    analogWrite(ML_PWM, carSpeed);
    digitalWrite(MR_Ctrl, HIGH);
    analogWrite(MR_PWM, carSpeed);
}

void car_right() {
    digitalWrite(ML_Ctrl, HIGH);
    analogWrite(ML_PWM, carSpeed);
    digitalWrite(MR_Ctrl, LOW);
    analogWrite(MR_PWM, carSpeed);
}

void car_Stop() {
    analogWrite(ML_PWM, 0);
    analogWrite(MR_PWM, 0);
}

// --- Matrix Functions ---
void matrix_display(unsigned char matrix_value[]) {
    IIC_start();
    IIC_send(0xc0);
    for(int i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
        IIC_send(matrix_value[i]);
    }
    IIC_end();
    IIC_start();
    IIC_send(0x8A);
    IIC_end();
}

void IIC_start() {
    digitalWrite(SCL_Pin, HIGH);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
    digitalWrite(SDA_Pin, HIGH);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
    digitalWrite(SDA_Pin, LOW);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
}

void IIC_send(unsigned char send_data) {
    for(char i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        digitalWrite(SCL_Pin, LOW);
        delayMicroseconds(3);
        if(send_data & 0x01) digitalWrite(SDA_Pin, HIGH);
        else digitalWrite(SDA_Pin, LOW);
        delayMicroseconds(3);
        digitalWrite(SCL_Pin, HIGH);
        delayMicroseconds(3);
        send_data = send_data >> 1;
    }
}

void IIC_end() {
    digitalWrite(SCL_Pin, LOW);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
    digitalWrite(SDA_Pin, LOW);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
    digitalWrite(SCL_Pin, HIGH);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
    digitalWrite(SDA_Pin, HIGH);
    delayMicroseconds(3);
}
```
